text:
- Citation engine: line-number the transcript (same enumeration the slicer uses), mint `[^<5char-session>-<n>]`, Rust slices verbatim from the cited ranges → inserts the marker into the section prose → appends sliced text to per-wiki `_citations.log`. [...] - **Evidence = transcript line ranges, Rust slices verbatim** — integrity by construction, no string-matching/fuzzy. The model never types transcript text or a `[^id]`.
- Citations: `[^<session>-<n>]` markers in guides + per-wiki `_citations.log`; **round-trip proven** (marker → log → real transcript span).
